tracks.name: Starter Track
tracks.description: The fundamentals of programming, step by step.

lessons.title: 1. Variables
lessons.instruction: Create a variable named 'score', set it to 10, then print it.
lessons.goal: Learn how to store and retrieve data.
lessons.exercise: Try changing the value of 'score' to 20 and run the code again.

lessons.title: 2. Conditions
lessons.instruction: Check if a variable 'age' is 18 or older. If it is, print 'Access granted', otherwise print 'Access denied'. Set age to 20 first.
lessons.goal: Learn how to make decisions in code.
lessons.exercise: Change 'age' to 15 and see the output change.

lessons.title: 3. Loops
lessons.instruction: Create a loop that prints the numbers from 1 to 5.
lessons.exercise: Modify the loop to print numbers from 1 to 10.

lessons.title: 4. Functions
lessons.instruction: Define a function named 'greet' that takes a name and prints 'Hello, ' followed by the name. Call it with 'Alice'.
lessons.goal: Learn how to group code into reusable blocks.
lessons.exercise: Call the function again with your own name.

lessons.title: 5. Lists
lessons.instruction: Create a list of colors: 'red', 'green', 'blue'. Print the second color in the list.
lessons.goal: Learn how to store collections of data.
lessons.exercise: Add 'yellow' to the list and print the whole list.
